place: Berawa, Tibubeneng, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali, Indonesia
title: Four-Bedroom Modern-Balinese Villa with 17-Metre Lap Pool and Rooftop-Garden Suite
blurb: A four-bedroom modern-Balinese villa amid Berawa's paddy fields, with a 17-metre lap pool and children's pool, a hammock gazebo, a top-floor master crowned by a rooftop garden and balcony, all a short walk from Canggu's beach clubs.
detail:
Set among tranquil paddy fields in Berawa, this two-storey villa spans 1,450 m² and blends traditional Balinese craft with contemporary comfort, from shingle roofs and teak floors to concrete walls and cream granite. Four en-suite bedrooms each carry a king bed and views over pool, garden or living room, several with indoor-outdoor bathrooms wrapped in greenery. The pool-facing master claims the entire upper floor, opening to its own balcony and rooftop garden.

The open-plan living and dining rooms flow into a kitchen and out to the water, with an oversized sofa for lazy afternoons and an air-conditioned media room for film marathons. Outdoors, a 17-metre lap pool runs alongside a shallow children's pool, while a hammock swings in the garden gazebo and the manicured lawn doubles as a yoga deck. It is a layout built equally for grown-up relaxation and family play.

A short ten-minute walk leads to Berawa Beach and Canggu's most stylish beach clubs and restaurants, striking a balance between quiet and connection. Breakfast is included daily, a chef can be arranged for meals to any taste, and a resident team of manager, attendants, gardener and security keeps the days running smoothly. The grounds also host celebrations, seating up to 50 guests or 100 standing.

features.l: Short walk to Canggu beach clubs
